# Music Habits

This is my current listening data from apple music for the band *Ghost*.

# Data Analysis

Import any necessary libraries.


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(moderndive)
library(stringr)
```
:::


As usual, I import the data from my apple music account.


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
ghost <- read_tsv("Ghost.txt", show_col_types = FALSE)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
Warning: One or more parsing issues, call `problems()` on your data frame for details,
e.g.:
  dat <- vroom(...)
  problems(dat)
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
# cleanup data
ghost <- ghost |>
  janitor::clean_names() |>
  janitor::remove_empty() |>
  rename(duration = time) |>
  filter(!is.na(plays), plays > 0) |>
  filter(!is.na(duration)) |>
  filter(album != "13 Commandments") |>
  mutate(album = str_to_lower(str_trim(album)))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
value for "which" not specified, defaulting to c("rows", "cols")
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
ghost |>
  head()
```

:::


Plot the data in a histogram.


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
ggplot(ghost, aes(x=plays, fill=album)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth=8, na.rm = TRUE)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](index_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-3-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::


::: callout-note
The data is **uni-model** and **right-skewed**, therefore, the **median** will be used here.
:::

Next, I create a table of some useful values.


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
ghost <- ghost |> 
  mutate(total_seconds = duration * plays)
ghost |>
  summarise(
    median_plays = median(plays),
    mean_plays = mean(plays),
    total_plays = sum(plays),
    total_hours = sum(total_seconds, na.rm = TRUE) / 3600
  ) -> ghost_summary 

ghost_summary |> 
  kable()
```

::: {.cell-output-display}


| median_plays| mean_plays| total_plays| total_hours|
|------------:|----------:|-----------:|-----------:|
|           21|   36.81667|        2209|    157.2242|


:::
:::


These values tell us that:

```         
- 50% of songs are played less than 21 times.
- across the selection of music, if the plays were evenly distributed, then the average number of plays would be 36.8166667 times.
- the combined number of plays across all songs is 2209.
- I spent about 157.2241667 hours listening.
```
